task_completion.description: Navigate to the Default Domain in Nuxeo Platform
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Nuxeo Platform web interface is open, and 'Default Domain' is visible in the breadcrumb navigation or the left-hand navigation tree.
The 'Workspaces' folder or section is selected and actively displayed in the main content area or highlighted in the navigation menu.

task_completion.description: Open the form or dialog to create a new Workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: A creation modal, dropdown, or page is open showing options to create a new document, specifically with 'Workspace' selected or being created.
The text 'Marketing Materials' is typed into the 'Title' or 'Name' input field of the new workspace creation form.

task_completion.description: Confirm the creation of the 'Marketing Materials' workspace
task_completion.visual_evidence: The newly created 'Marketing Materials' workspace is visible in the main view, listed under the Workspaces section, appears in the breadcrumb trail, or a success message is displayed indicating it was created.

integrity.description: The agent used the web browser GUI to interact with Nuxeo
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a web browser interface (e.g., Chrome, Firefox) displaying the Nuxeo Platform, rather than terminal windows or scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not use terminal commands or API clients to bypass the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: No terminal windows with curl commands, Python scripts, or API testing tools (like Postman) are used to send REST API requests to http://localhost:8080/nuxeo/api/v1.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Nuxeo application
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show genuine Nuxeo Platform UI elements, buttons, and forms being clicked and filled, not just text pasted into a text editor or a mocked HTML page.

privileged_info_for_vlm: No verified privileged information available. The task is a functional test for Nuxeo Platform 10.10 that requires creating a new Workspace named 'Marketing Materials' inside the 'Workspaces' section of the Default Domain via the web UI.
